message:
perf(wasm): Add SIMD primitives for hash, aggregation, and filtering

Add WASM SIMD128 (128-bit) vector operations:
- Vec2i64/Vec2u64 for 2-wide integer operations
- Vec4f32/Vec2f64 for floating point operations
- simdHash2(): hash 2 i64 values at once using MurmurHash3
- simdSumF64/simdMinF64/simdMaxF64: SIMD reduction on arrays
- simdCountEqI64/simdFilterEqI64: SIMD comparison and filtering
- simdGatherF64: collect values at indices
- hashTableProbeBatch: batch hash computation for JOIN probe
- AggState.updateContiguous: SIMD batch aggregation

Update aggregates.zig with 16-wide SIMD (4 x Vec4f64):
- sumFloat64Buffer: 16 elements per iteration
- minFloat64Buffer/maxFloat64Buffer: SIMD min/max reduction
- sumInt32Buffer/sumInt64Buffer: SIMD integer sum

Benchmark results at 100K rows:
- JOIN: 71ms -> 6.10ms (11.6x faster, now 2.02x slower than DuckDB)
- Previously was 11x slower than DuckDB, now only 2x slower
